institution.name: Defesa Civil Municipal - Sao Paulo
institution.description: Municipal Civil Defense responsible for disaster prevention, preparedness, response, and recovery. Coordinates volunteer mobilization during landslide and flood events in Sao Paulo.

volunteers.name: Ana Silva
volunteers.persona_summary: Experienced logística coordinator and primeiros socorros provider. Team leader with 5 years of disaster response experience. Owns a vehicle and is available full-time during crises. Key volunteer for the happy-path demo: she should appear as a top match for critical incidents requiring primeiros socorros and logística.
volunteers.demo_role: Top match for Scenario 1 (critical landslide). Demonstrates skill-based matching.

volunteers.name: Carlos Mendes
volunteers.persona_summary: Senior engenharia estrutural with USAR certification. 10 years of experience and 25 past deployments. The go-to expert for building safety assessment after landslides. Available on weekends and evenings.
volunteers.demo_role: Top match for structural assessment in Scenario 1. Demonstrates expertise-based matching.

volunteers.name: Beatriz Oliveira
volunteers.persona_summary: Young psychologist specialized in crisis intervention and trauma support. Trilingual (Portuguese, English, Spanish). Uses public transport, so proximity scoring may be lower for distant incidents.
volunteers.demo_role: Matched for apoio psicológico in Scenario 1. Demonstrates diverse skill coverage.

volunteers.name: Diego Nascimento
volunteers.persona_summary: operador de drone e especialista em mapeamento gis. Produces aerial risk maps rapidly. Licensed by ANAC. Key for reconnaissance and mapping during the response phase.
volunteers.demo_role: Matched for aerial mapping in Scenario 1 and 2. Demonstrates tech-enabled volunteering.

volunteers.name: Fernanda Costa
volunteers.persona_summary: Volunteer firefighter with wilderness primeiros socorros certification. 8 years of rescue experience in hillside terrain. Strong candidate for search and rescue operations.
volunteers.demo_role: Matched for busca e resgate in Scenario 1. Demonstrates field rescue capability.

volunteers.name: Gabriel Santos
volunteers.persona_summary: logística coordinator with ham radio certification. Young volunteer available full-time. Useful for supply distribution and emergency comunicação in areas without cell coverage.
volunteers.demo_role: Secondary match for logística and comunicação. Demonstrates comunicação resilience.

volunteers.name: Helena Rodrigues
volunteers.persona_summary: Senior engenharia geotécnica e especialista em mapeamento gis. 15 years of experience and 35 deployments. Currently unavailable (deployed at another site). Her unavailability demonstrates the system's filtering logic.
volunteers.demo_role: Filtered OUT by the matcher due to available=false. Demonstrates availability filtering.

volunteers.name: Igor Ferreira
volunteers.persona_summary: Drone pilot with night-flight certification and emergency radio training. Available on weekends. Good complementary resource to Diego for larger operations.
volunteers.demo_role: Secondary match for drone operations. Demonstrates depth of volunteer pool.

volunteers.name: Felipe Z
volunteers.persona_summary: Highly skilled volunteer with a wide range of certifications including busca e resgate, primeiros socorros e engenharia estrutural. Based in Jardim Amanda, he is a top responder for critical incidents.
volunteers.demo_role: Top match for critical incidents in Jardim Amanda. Demonstrates high-skill matching.

volunteers.name: Guilherme Cezarino Felipe
volunteers.persona_summary: Recently registered volunteer via wxO agent. Eager to help with primeiros socorros e logística. Local to Jardim Amanda.
volunteers.demo_role: Demonstrates new volunteer registration through the system.

happy_path.title: Critical landslide at Brasilandia
happy_path.user_message: Houve um grande deslizamento na Rua das Flores, bairro Brasilandia. Tres predios residenciais estao em risco de desabamento. Chuva forte nas ultimas 48 horas. Pelo menos 15 pessoas podem estar presas. Precisamos de ajuda urgente.
expected_flow: Tool A (geo_context) is called to check risk area data for Brasilandia
Tool B (classifier) classifies the incident as CRITICAL
Tool C (matcher) returns ranked list of available volunteers
Agent presents the top 5 volunteers with skills and distance
Agent suggests notification to selected volunteers

incomplete_info.title: Incomplete information scenario
incomplete_info.user_message: Parece que teve um problema numa encosta aqui perto. Ta chovendo muito.
expected_flow: Agent asks clarifying questions: location, number of affected people, visible damage
Agent proceeds with classification and matching
clarifying_questions: Qual a localizacao exata do incidente? (endereco ou bairro)
Ha pessoas em risco ou feridas?
Voce observa rachaduras no solo, danos em edificios ou deslizamento de terra visivel?
Ha quanto tempo a situacao comecou?
